name: vortos/vortos
description: The Vortos Clean Architecture Framework — project skeleton

post-create-project-cmd:
@php -r "$dir = basename(getcwd()); echo '
\033[32m✔ Vortos downloaded successfully!\033[0m

To configure your environment, run:

  \033[1mcd ' . $dir . '\033[0m
  \033[1mphp vortos setup\033[0m

';"
